message:
fix(codegen): Reduce monomorphization in assertRaises and sliceWithStep

- Add isErrorSet helper to container_dispatch.zig
- Update misc.zig to use isErrorUnion/isErrorSet helpers instead of
  inline @typeInfo checks in assertRaises context manager
- Update subscript.zig to use getSlice helper instead of inline
  @hasField check in sliceWithStep pattern

Reduces @hasField patterns to 0 and @typeInfo patterns from ~20 to 2
in generated test_list.zig. Part of ongoing monomorphization reduction
effort for core1 tests.
